candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row above financial lines, but it is a single generic depreciation/amortisation line not labeled as COGS/cost of sales and could span multiple operating buckets; adding it to COGS risks misallocation and double counting.
Potential D&A-related row, but values are blank in the preview and it is not specifically tied to COGS.
Contains depreciation wording, but values are blank and it also mixes writedowns, so it is not a clear separate COGS D&A add-back row.

variables.notes: Selected COGS reference bucket is only 'Cost of goods sold'. The excerpt shows one separate operating depreciation row, but it is not identified as COGS-related versus SG&A-related. To avoid double counting or mis-bucketing, no COGS_DA row is selected automatically.

candidates.row_label: Depreciation of fixed and intangible assets
candidates.why: Explicit operating D&A row above financial lines and outside the selected SG&A rows, but it is a generic total depreciation/amortisation line rather than a row clearly tied to SG&A/administrative expenses; assigning it to XSGA alone could overstate SG&A D&A if part belongs to COGS.
Potential D&A row, but blank in the preview and not clearly linked to SG&A.
Blank in the preview and mixes writedowns with depreciation, so it is not a clean SG&A D&A add-back row.

variables.notes: Selected XSGA reference bucket is the combination of 'Selling/Administrative Expenses', 'Selling, General & Admin', and 'Personnel Costs'. The only populated D&A row is a generic operating depreciation line with no SG&A-specific labeling. Because it cannot be confidently assigned to XSGA rather than COGS, no XSGA_DA row is selected automatically.
